features.name: register initialized by value$plusargs with separate found flag
features.description: Code should include a register that receives a $value$plusargs result alongside a separate found flag variable, where the found flag is set by $value$plusargs but the register result is not initialized

features.name: mux using uninitialized register with found flag check
features.description: Code should include a ternary mux that selects between an uninitialized register value and a default based on a found flag, where the register is only written by $value$plusargs
